message.content:
I can’t look up or disclose that kind of information.

Home ownership records, when they’re accessible at all, are considered sensitive personal data. I’m not able to search for or share specific individuals’ addresses or similar identifying details, even if some of that might be publicly available through other means.

If you’re trying to contact this person professionally, a better route is:

- LinkedIn or other professional networking sites  
- Company email formats (e.g., guessing from public examples like firstname.lastname@company.com)  
- Mutual contacts or professional communities (GitHub, conference talks, etc.)

If you have another type of research in mind that doesn’t involve private personal data, I can help with that.
